description:
GIVEN a free user launches the app
OR an unauthenticated user launches the app
AND the user has TTS enabled

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the "Get MLB.TV" button
steps.result:
THEN the app reader says “Get MLB.TV, press select to Get MLB.TV now, X of Y in the menu, press right or left for more items in the menu”

NOTE: X should be based on how many buttons are visible to the user in the menu and the place that Get MLB.TV is in that order
